'''kavusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dracunculiasis|dracunculiasis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-v-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dracunculiasis|dracunculiasis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kavusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kævisith|kævisith]] || [[word:kævisij|kævisij]] || [[word:kævisish|kævisish]] || [[word:kævisi|kævisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kavuvusuth|kavuvusuth]] || [[word:kavuvusuj|kavuvusuj]] || [[word:kavuvusush|kavuvusush]] || [[word:kavuvusu|kavuvusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kavusuth|kavusuth]] || [[word:kavusuj|kavusuj]] || [[word:kavusush|kavusush]] || [[word:kavusu|kavusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kavufsuth|kavufsuth]] || [[word:kavufsuj|kavufsuj]] || [[word:kavufsush|kavufsush]] || [[word:kavufsuf|kavufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kavusuthu|kavusuthu]] || [[word:kavusuju|kavusuju]] || [[word:kavusushu|kavusushu]] || [[word:kavusuku|kavusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kavusuth|kavusuth]] || [[word:kavusuj|kavusuj]] || [[word:kavusush|kavusush]] || [[word:kavusu|kavusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kavusuthul|kavusuthul]] || [[word:kavusujul|kavusujul]] || [[word:kavusushul|kavusushul]] || [[word:kavusukul|kavusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kavusuthuthu|kavusuthuthu]] || [[word:kavusujuju|kavusujuju]] || [[word:kavusushushu|kavusushushu]] || [[word:kavusuku|kavusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kavusuthun|kavusuthun]] || [[word:kavusujun|kavusujun]] || [[word:kavusushun|kavusushun]] || [[word:kavusukun|kavusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kavusuthuoro|kavusuthuoro]] || [[word:kavusujuoro|kavusujuoro]] || [[word:kavusushuoro|kavusushuoro]] || [[word:kavusukuoro|kavusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
